evals.expected_output: Agent fetches the ticket, moves it to Develop, then runs the full pipeline (implement, validate, review, branch, commit, PR, YouTrack update) without asking for user confirmation between phases.
assertions: Agent fetches the ticket with get_issue
Agent moves the ticket to Develop state
Agent does NOT pause for user confirmation between phases
Agent runs make check and make test before committing
Agent creates a feature branch, not committing to main
Agent creates a PR via gh pr create
Agent moves the ticket to Review state after PR creation
Agent reports the PR URL at the end

evals.prompt: /autosteer Add a --verbose flag to the status command
evals.expected_output: Agent creates a YouTrack issue from the description, then runs the full pipeline autonomously.
assertions: Agent creates a YouTrack issue with a summary derived from the task description
Agent does NOT ask for approval of the issue draft — creates it directly
Agent proceeds through all phases without pausing
Agent runs quality gates (make check, make test, make test-cov-check)
Agent creates a branch and PR

evals.prompt: /autosteer DBA-301 (assume make test fails on first run)
evals.expected_output: Agent detects the test failure, attempts to fix the code, and re-runs tests. If still failing after two attempts, stops and reports.
assertions: Agent does NOT skip the failing tests
Agent attempts to fix the failure
Agent re-runs make test after fixing
Agent stops and reports if unable to fix after two attempts
Agent does NOT create a PR with failing tests
